name: stackra/storage
purpose: File-upload substrate — File + FileVariant + SignedUrlAudit + ChunkedUpload aggregates over spatie/laravel-medialibrary with antivirus, dedup, and per-tenant quota.
capabilities: File polymorphic aggregate (fil_...) — one per byte-stream
SignedUrlAudit issued URL ledger with TTL + IP + user lock
ChunkedUpload tus.io / S3 multipart resumable state machine
when_to_use: Uploading + serving user or admin-generated files (images, PDFs, exports) against a tenant with dedup + AV.
when_not_to_use: For opaque per-integration secrets, use the sibling stackra/credentials or stackra/integrations packages.
